content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from Topic A's autonomous ICM agents can be repurposed to gate memory consolidation in meta-learning agents from Topic B, only consolidating unexpected, high learning-potential memories that accelerate cross-task generalization instead of overfitting to common task patterns. This creates a "curiosity-filtered meta-memory" system that resolves the current 2024-2025 SOTA challenge of catastrophic forgetting in few-shot meta-learning.
